target.description: Synthetic prompt-only behavior benchmark for hosted black-box API.

position_policy.details: Prompt-level comparison only; no token-internal intervention.

expected_effect: Measure output behavior under prompt-only variation.
forbidden_effects: Do not claim hidden-state, SAE, or attribution-graph evidence.
Do not treat black-box output as feature-level evidence.
non_claims: Black-box prompt fixture only; no internal model access.
Does not support feature steering or activation patching claims.
